_comment: App Update Automation — Central Configuration for Diabetic Plus

app.name: Diabetic Plus
app.description: Track daily logs, blood sugar levels, activity logs, meals, guidelines, diabetes risk scores, and symptoms offline.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Track daily logs, blood sugar charts, activity records, and symptoms completely offline.
features: Log blood sugar readings and view visual charts
Plan meals, calculate diabetes risk scores, and check medical guidelines
Keep symptoms and activity logs saved securely on your device

pages.settingsCurrencyDescription: Change the display currency for your reports.
pages.settingsResetDescription: Wipe all local diabetes logs, custom templates, and configuration settings completely.

mobile.name: Diabetic Plus (Mobile)
mobile.description: Daily logs, blood sugar charts, activity records, meal planners, guidelines, risk scores, and symptoms tracker.

tablet.name: Diabetic Plus (Tablet)
tablet.description: Comprehensive daily logs, blood sugar charts, activity records, meal planners, guidelines, risk scores, and symptoms tracker.

desktop.name: Diabetic Plus (Desktop)
desktop.description: Comprehensive daily logs, blood sugar charts, activity records, meal planners, guidelines, risk scores, and symptoms tracker.

pdf.shareSubject: Here is your Diabetic Plus Report
pdf.shareText: Diabetic Plus Report PDF generated successfully

menu.emailSubject: Here is your Diabetic Plus Report

ios.cameraUsageDescription: Diabetic Plus needs access to your camera to scan medical reports or food labels.
ios.photoLibraryUsageDescription: Diabetic Plus needs access to your photo library to save prescription images.
ios.microphoneUsageDescription: Diabetic Plus needs microphone access when recording notes with camera.
